findings.description: PDF page footer text is inserted between the letterhead/header area and the main proclamation content (FF-52-2023), disrupting the natural reading order.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, the footer 'State of North Carolina | Division of Marine Fisheries / 3441 Arendell Street...' appears only at the bottom of each page. In the HTML, this footer text appears between the logo/officials header block and the 'FF-52-2023' proclamation number, forcing a reader to encounter footer content mid-flow before reaching the main document body.

findings.description: Repeated footer content inserted between the end of Section III (Gear Restrictions) and the start of Section IV (General Information), disrupting reading order.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, the footer only appears at the page bottom and a reader flows directly from the end of Section III.B (Trawls) to Section IV (General Information) across the page break. In the HTML, the footer text 'State of North Carolina | Division of Marine Fisheries / 3441 Arendell Street...' is inserted inline between these sections, breaking the content flow.
